title: Expanded Trident Enchantings
description: This Datapack and Mod allow to use Fire Aspect, Knockback, Looting, Impaling, Density, Breach, and Wind Burst on an Trident. It also allows you to mixing different Weapon Enchantments Types on the same Trident!
body: # Expanded Trident Enchantings **This Datapack and Mod** expands the Weapon Enchantments to include Fire Aspect, Knockback, Looting, Impaling, Density, Breach, and Wind Burst on an Trident. It also allows you to mix different weapon enchantment types on the same Trident! **‎◾Examples:** ![Expanded Trident Enchantings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c52f1a0ac7ffd152c4f25ed7701ce3061d8e992.jpeg) ![Expanded Trident Enchantings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f885bc7c037174546d7ccd3144bee3f78e2c90de.jpeg) ## Details📝 - **Expanded Trident Enchantings** is **compatible** with versions **1.21 to 1.21.11** - **Expanded Trident Enchantings** adds new **(expansion)** to enchanting table🌐 - **Expanded Trident Enchantings** is compatible with any **enchantings datapacks** - **No** it is necessary to **unzip** the downloaded file 🗂️ ## More Projects:
